name_cn:
【Elephant Yellow New Size】
Dior Mini Book tote
A retro and stylish statement piece♡ The exquisite embroidery craftsmanship is perfectly presented, adding a highlight to your outfit with just a casual carry~ This mini bag is so adorable! The small size is also convenient for holding small odds and ends~ Who wears it is stylish, a must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Style No.: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
